title: Ergosphere Observer Angular Velocity Range
desc: Derives allowed angular velocity range for observers inside ergosphere, approaching horizon.

title: Lorentz Invariance and Optical Theorem
desc: Proving Lorentz invariance of inner product and optical theorem via unitarity.

title: Null Momentum Spinor Decomposition
desc: Derives spinor expressions for null momentum with negative energy and LGT transformation.

title: Spinor Helicity for Massless Amplitudes
desc: Introduces spinor helicity formalism for massless amplitudes using Lorentz group decomposition.

title: Lecture 6: Gluon & Graviton Amplitudes
desc: Analyze vanishing amplitudes, factorization, and spin constraints in Yang-Mills and gravity.

title: Interferometer Noise and Quantum Noise Analysis
desc: Overview of noise sources in Advanced LIGO, focusing on quantum noise and thermal effects.

title: Bose-Einstein Condensation in 2D and 3D
desc: Proves no BEC in 2D ideal Bose gas; derives BEC in 3D harmonic trap.

title: QFT: Renormalization and Photon Fields
desc: Lecture on QFT covering renormalization, perturbation theory, and photon field quantization.

title: 量子力学第6次作业：中心力场
desc: 二体系统动能算符分解及球方势阱束缚态条件分析。

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 7
desc: Seventh assignment covering key quantum mechanics concepts.

title: Feynman Diagrams for Beginners
desc: Introduction to Feynman diagrams with exercises, covering QED scattering calculations.

title: Statistical Mechanics Homework 3: Phase Transition
desc: Derives molar internal energy change and latent heat variation with temperature.

title: 统计力学第6次作业分析
desc: 二维气体速度分布与相对速率分布推导及计算。

title: Lecture 6: Chasse_neige and Four Particle Test
desc: Analyzing 4-point amplitudes using on-shell factorization and tree-level approximation.

title: 引力波的产生、传播与探测
desc: 线性引力近似下引力波的数学推导与探测原理。

title: 统计力学作业：熵与磁化强度
desc: 求解爱因斯坦固体熵及顺磁体磁化强度与磁化率。

title: Dyson Series and On-Shell Factorization
desc: Derivation of Dyson series for transition amplitude with source and on-shell factorization theorem steps.

title: 量子力学阶跃势与概率守恒
desc: 求解阶跃势反射透射系数，验证R+T=1，证明概率守恒与对称性。

title: 量子力学对称性与守恒量分析
desc: 证明自由粒子角动量守恒及Feynman-Hellmann定理。

title: On-Shell Factorization in QFT
desc: Analyzes Green function poles and on-shell factorization using a light bulb model.

title: General Relativity Homework 4: Killing Vectors
desc: Proving that δ^μ_t and δ^μ_φ are Killing vectors of Schwarzschild metric.

title: General Relativity Homework 5: Metric Analysis
desc: Calculate connection and Ricci tensor for a time-dependent spherically symmetric metric.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 4: Operator Identities
desc: Proofs of inverse Hermitian conjugate and generalized uncertainty relation.

title: 统计力学第5次作业：混合粒子系统最概然分布
desc: 计算经典、玻色、费米子混合系统的最概然分布，并讨论β与温度对应。

title: Lecture 2: Integrals and Photon Tensor
desc: Solve integral using residue theorem, derive traceless energy-momentum tensor for photon field.

title: Scattering Theory Axioms and Fock Space
desc: Fundamental principles restrain interactions; delve into scattering amplitude using analyticity.

title: 统计力学第4次作业分析
desc: 归一化几率分布，计算边缘概率，分类玻色子与费米子。

title: Advanced Calculus: Taylor's Theorem Review
desc: Covers Taylor's theorem with Peano, Lagrange, and Cauchy remainders.

title: Advanced Calculus Homework 1: Series Convergence
desc: Analyze convergence of 6 series using comparison, ratio, and root tests.

title: 高等微积分作业：曲面积分与曲线积分
desc: 计算第二型曲面积分和曲线积分，涉及参数化和格林公式。
